## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and AfterShoot teams to discuss content strategy, progress, and new initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/Yn2H3XV5iyRjpJLFeXWvoB9vEyn_ERfr?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance showing positive early signs, with consistent impression growth](https://fathom.video/share/Yn2H3XV5iyRjpJLFeXWvoB9vEyn_ERfr?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [New outline review process working well; will scale up to build a backlog](https://fathom.video/share/Yn2H3XV5iyRjpJLFeXWvoB9vEyn_ERfr?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
  - [Proposed new content initiative: city/state-specific wedding and engagement photo location guides](https://fathom.video/share/Yn2H3XV5iyRjpJLFeXWvoB9vEyn_ERfr?tab=summary&timestamp=800.0)
  - [Content refreshes paused for now to focus on new out-of-market topics and building authority](https://fathom.video/share/Yn2H3XV5iyRjpJLFeXWvoB9vEyn_ERfr?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Update

  - [Portrait photography types article published a week ago showing strong early performance (2000 impressions in first week)](https://fathom.video/share/Yn2H3XV5iyRjpJLFeXWvoB9vEyn_ERfr?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Overall consistent impression growth for published content](https://fathom.video/share/Yn2H3XV5iyRjpJLFeXWvoB9vEyn_ERfr?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)
  - [Email marketing for photographers article ranking on first page (around 7th position)](https://fathom.video/share/Yn2H3XV5iyRjpJLFeXWvoB9vEyn_ERfr?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

### Content Process Improvements

  - [Outline review process with photographer expertise inclusion working well](https://fathom.video/share/Yn2H3XV5iyRjpJLFeXWvoB9vEyn_ERfr?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
  - [Plan to build backlog of outlines for more efficient workflow](https://fathom.video/share/Yn2H3XV5iyRjpJLFeXWvoB9vEyn_ERfr?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)
  - [Considering adding "outline stage" in project management system](https://fathom.video/share/Yn2H3XV5iyRjpJLFeXWvoB9vEyn_ERfr?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)
  - [Increased bandwidth with Manaswini joining the team](https://fathom.video/share/Yn2H3XV5iyRjpJLFeXWvoB9vEyn_ERfr?tab=summary&timestamp=770.0)

### New Content Initiative: Location-based Guides

  - [Proposal for city/state-specific wedding and engagement photo location guides](https://fathom.video/share/Yn2H3XV5iyRjpJLFeXWvoB9vEyn_ERfr?tab=summary&timestamp=800.0)
  - [Potential for high search volume, especially with "near me" searches](https://fathom.video/share/Yn2H3XV5iyRjpJLFeXWvoB9vEyn_ERfr?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Scalable template-based approach for efficient content production](https://fathom.video/share/Yn2H3XV5iyRjpJLFeXWvoB9vEyn_ERfr?tab=summary&timestamp=920.0)
  - [Opportunity to create hub pages and internal linking structure](https://fathom.video/share/Yn2H3XV5iyRjpJLFeXWvoB9vEyn_ERfr?tab=summary&timestamp=950.0)
  - [Need to determine how to subtly incorporate product mentions](https://fathom.video/share/Yn2H3XV5iyRjpJLFeXWvoB9vEyn_ERfr?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)

### Content Refresh Strategy

  - [Pausing external content refreshes for now](https://fathom.video/share/Yn2H3XV5iyRjpJLFeXWvoB9vEyn_ERfr?tab=summary&timestamp=1430.0)
  - [Focus on creating out-of-market topics and building authority](https://fathom.video/share/Yn2H3XV5iyRjpJLFeXWvoB9vEyn_ERfr?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [In-house content audit underway to inform future refresh strategy](https://fathom.video/share/Yn2H3XV5iyRjpJLFeXWvoB9vEyn_ERfr?tab=summary&timestamp=1450.0)

### Brand/Writing Guidelines

  - [GrowthX team started work on creating guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/Yn2H3XV5iyRjpJLFeXWvoB9vEyn_ERfr?tab=summary&timestamp=1610.0)
  - [Progress has been limited due to time constraints](https://fathom.video/share/Yn2H3XV5iyRjpJLFeXWvoB9vEyn_ERfr?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Scale up outline creation to build a backlog for review](https://fathom.video/share/Yn2H3XV5iyRjpJLFeXWvoB9vEyn_ERfr?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [Present location-based guide concept to Rashid for approval](https://fathom.video/share/Yn2H3XV5iyRjpJLFeXWvoB9vEyn_ERfr?tab=summary&timestamp=1570.0)
  - [Develop project plan for location-based guides if approved](https://fathom.video/share/Yn2H3XV5iyRjpJLFeXWvoB9vEyn_ERfr?tab=summary&timestamp=1570.0)
  - [Continue focus on new content production over refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/Yn2H3XV5iyRjpJLFeXWvoB9vEyn_ERfr?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
  - [GrowthX to continue work on brand/writing guidelines when time allows](https://fathom.video/share/Yn2H3XV5iyRjpJLFeXWvoB9vEyn_ERfr?tab=summary&timestamp=1610.0)
  - [Jakub offered support for content audit process if needed](https://fathom.video/share/Yn2H3XV5iyRjpJLFeXWvoB9vEyn_ERfr?tab=summary&timestamp=1510.0)
